events.title: @sentry/node 10.53.1->10.60.0 (minor)
events.notes: Dependabot metadata listed 10.58.0; actual 10.60.0. tsc 0 errors, prod-readiness 892/892. No fixer needed.

events.title: @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin 8.60->8.62 (standalone)
events.lens_b_findings: P0 - npm ci ERESOLVE: plugin@8.62 peerDep parser^8.62, but parser pinned 8.60. Internal skew. All CI red attributable to PR, not flakiness.
events.notes: Hyperscaler pattern: prefer meta-package umbrella bump for monorepo families over per-package bumps that produce skew. Lens A cancelled mid-flight - answer clear from Lens B + #441 inspection.

events.title: typescript-eslint meta 8.60->8.62 (umbrella - cascades full @typescript-eslint/* family)
events.notes: Both lenses CLEAN. Followup #467 filed for P3 (package.json direct devDep floors for plugin/parser still ^8.60, cosmetic since caret resolves to 8.62 in lockfile).

events.title: @aws-sdk/client-s3 patch 3.1065->3.1071
events.notes: RUNTIME dep, sensitive storage surface - behavior-diff dim included

events.title: @aws-sdk/client-s3 patch 3.1065->3.1071
events.lens_b: CLEAN (GPT-5.5) - after retraction of false-positive P1
events.notes: Lens B initially raised P1 about typosquat transitives (@aws-sdk/credential-provider-login, @nodable/entities, anynum). Main agent + Lens A verified via npm registry - all legitimate transitives of fast-xml-parser@5.7+ and AWS SDK. Lens B re-prompted with evidence, self-corrected and retracted. SDK is dormant (zero src imports) - declared-but-unused, reserved for Phase B.

events.title: ioredis minor 5.10.1->5.11.1 (RUNTIME cache/queue)
events.notes: Sole consumer is @nest-lab/throttler-storage-redis (rate-limit). cluster-key-slot 1.1.2->1.1.1 confirmed as ioredis 5.11's exact pin (not malicious). No BullMQ in repo. INFO note: WHATWG URL parser percent-decodes Redis password (theoretical edge if token has reserved chars).

events.title: eslint minor 10.4.0->10.5.0 (DEV lint-only)
events.notes: All 10.5.0 'features' are violation-location refinements (max-nested-callbacks, no-with, etc.) - none enabled in repo's eslint.config.js. typescript-eslint 8.62 peerDep range includes 10.5.0.

events.title: @nestjs/core patch 11.1.26->11.1.27
events.notes: Two fixes: SSE async-teardown (no @Sse() decorators in repo) + platform-fastify trailing-slash (repo uses platform-express). Both touch unexercised paths. Zero behavior risk.

events.title: axios 2-MINOR jump 1.16.1->1.18.1 (RUNTIME HTTP client)
events.risk: HIGHER - 2 minors of changelog surface on HTTP client, potential Stripe/payment webhook payload impact

events.title: axios 2-MINOR 1.16.1->1.18.1 (RUNTIME HTTP)
events.notes: Lockfile delta is axios-only (transitive ranges byte-identical). No Stripe usage (Stripe uses native fetch). axios footprint = 5 CRM adapters (ActiveCampaign/GoHighLevel/Mailchimp/HubSpot/generic webhook), all with validateStatus override + maxRedirects:0 + explicit timeouts/headers. HMAC uses raw bodyJson string via transformRequest:[(d)=>d]. Zero behavior risk.

events.selection_rationale: First mobile PR - smallest scope, CI clean. Then #268 (react-navigation group clean), #267 (expo group clean), then investigate failing #266 (dev-deps) and #269 (react+types patch with CI failure).

events.title: react-native-safe-area-context 5.7.0->5.8.0 (RUNTIME native)
events.notes: Single change in 5.8.0: remove UIImplementation from SafeAreaView (Android legacy-Paper API cleanup, beneficial for Fabric/New Arch). No public API, inset value, or rendering change. fsevents 'dev:true' removal is benign churn (macOS-only optional, never installed on CI/devices).
